name: Open-label ambroxol target-engagement trial in Parkinson disease
summary: A single-center open-label trial of high-dose oral ambroxol in Parkinson disease patients with and without GBA1 mutations.
population: Parkinson disease patients with and without GBA1 mutations

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Lysosomal Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and safety in Parkinson disease patients with and without GBA1 mutations. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
